original_hypothesis.title: LockingMultiRewards.recover() Can Drain Undistributed Reward Tokens
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The recover() function only restricts skimming for the stakingToken. For any other token (including reward tokens), the owner can withdraw the ENTIRE balance with no checks against pending/undistributed rewards. This allows the owner to drain reward tokens that have been notified via notifyRewardAmount but not yet claimed by users.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Reward tokens are held by the contract and distributed over time via rewardRate. The owner can call recover(rewardToken, fullBalance) to withdraw all reward tokens, leaving the rewardRate pointing to non-existent tokens. Users' earned() will show rewards they can never claim.
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: LockingMultiRewards.s.sol shows staking.addReward(arb) - reward tokens are configured

proof_of_signal.pattern: Only checks skim limit for stakingToken; no protection for reward token balances against withdrawal

preconditions: Owner key compromised or malicious owner
Reward tokens have been notified and partially distributed

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: recover(rewardToken, type(uint256).max) withdraws all reward tokens with no pending reward check
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Owner calls recover for each reward token
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: All undistributed + unclaimed reward tokens extracted

economic_questions: What is the total value of reward tokens held by the contract?
Is the owner a multisig with adequate security?
Can this be mitigated by checking reward token balance against pending rewards?
validation_requirements: Call recover(rewardToken, balance) as owner and verify success
Verify users can no longer claim rewards after drain
Check if staking principal is affected

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: After large reward notification, before user claims
market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Total loss of all pending rewards for all stakers

potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Loss of all accrued but unclaimed rewards
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Total reward token balance in contract

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Current reward token balances vs pending distributions
investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Verify no implicit protection exists in recover for reward tokens

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
